creator: tacokoneko@gmail.com
text:
I don't have FreeBSD but I got this same error  while compiling Pillow 11.0 on a different operating system, and I found it can be worked around for me by manually updating the system "trove-classifiers" package to version "2024.10.21.16".  

I figured this out by reading about the issue reported in the upstream Pillow repository https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/issues/8470 , 

where an OpenBSD user had the same error too, and worked around it by updating their trove-classifiers package. 

I thought this information might be helpful for FreeBSD users here also.
